final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale campaign, designed for product detail page and social commerce sharing.

Style/medium: bold e-commerce campaign poster with the graphic clarity of 原研哉's brand identity work — clean geometry carrying festive energy without noise
Composition: vertical poster layout, brand name and campaign headline anchored at top third, hero product (private cloud device) centered as the visual weight, promotional callouts arranged in a confident lower panel
Subject: 绿联私有云 private cloud storage device as hero product, surrounded by 618 anniversary celebration visual elements — numerical "618" as a large typographic anchor, festive but restrained decorative accents
Scene/backdrop: deep tech-green to rich midnight-blue gradient field, evoking the security and depth of private data ownership
Lighting/mood: a cool, focused spotlight on the product — the quiet confidence of something worth protecting, with warm gold accents cutting through the cool field like a celebration signal
Color palette: 绿联 brand green in dialogue with midnight blue depth, warm gold as the 618 festive accent, white for legibility — cool trust meeting warm celebration
Materials/textures: smooth gradient ground with subtle light-refraction on the product surface, crisp typographic layers floating above
Text (verbatim): 绿联私有云　618周年庆
Constraints: vertical poster format (suitable for e-commerce banner), product must be clearly identifiable, all Chinese text legible at banner viewing distance, 618 numeral prominent
Avoid: cluttered discount-sticker chaos, generic red-yellow flash-sale aesthetic, illegible small print, Western tech poster clichés
